rule_metadata.name: bcedit
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'bcedit' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule bcedit
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'bcedit' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "bcedit"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /FOR\s\/F\s\\"tokens\=1\,2.{0,1000}\\"\s\%\%V\sIN\s\(\'bcdedit\'\)\sDO\sSET\sadminTest\=\%\%V/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
